name: Metadata Conforms to for DDE
abstract: For DDE profile, need to declare conformance with DDE profile in the metadata catalog record. Defines properties: dcterms:conformsTo. Uses building blocks: cdifCatalogRecord (cdifProperties).
description:
## Metadata metadata for DDE profile properties

Only addition is declaration of conformance with the DDE CDIF profile. Extends cdifCatalogRecord to require that `dcterms:conformsTo` includes `cdif:profile_ddeCDIF`.

examples.title: Example DDE metadata conforms to extension.
examples.content: Import base schema.org SubjectOf, add requirement that dcterms:conformsTo has DDE profile URI.

annotatedSchema:
$schema: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema
type: object
allOf:
- $ref: https://usgin.github.io/metadataBuildingBlocks/build/annotated/bbr/metadata/cdifProperties/cdifCatalogRecord/schema.yaml
- properties:
    dcterms:conformsTo:
      type: array
      items:
        $ref: https://usgin.github.io/metadataBuildingBlocks/build/annotated/bbr/metadata/cdifProperties/cdifCatalogRecord/schema.yaml#/$defs/conformsTo_item
      minItems: 2
      contains:
        type: object
        properties:
          '@id':
            const: cdif:profile_ddeCDIF
        required:
        - '@id'
      minContains: 1
x-jsonld-prefixes:
  schema: http://schema.org/
